# Handheld Settings Lab

Handheld Settings Lab publishes handheld PC game settings, calculators, and gear guides.

Core sections:
- /steam-deck-settings/
- /rog-ally-settings/
- /calculators/
- /guides/

Recent guide:
- /guides/handheld-gaming-ethernet-adapter-dock-checklist/ — source-informed Ethernet dock and USB-C adapter checklist for Steam Deck, ROG Ally, Legion Go, downloads, streaming, and multiplayer troubleshooting.

Editorial guardrails: do not fabricate benchmark data, test claims, affiliate relationships, or official affiliations.
